description.ko: 완벽한 기하학적 구조가 혼돈스럽지만 계산된 단색 파편의 소용돌이로 붕괴하는 모습을 묘사한 디지털 엔트로피 연구입니다.
description.en: A study in digital entropy, depicting a perfect geometric structure collapsing into a chaotic but calculated vortex of monochromatic fragments.

prompt: A brutalist digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Vector Disintegration.' A massive #1A1A1A obsidian tesseract frozen in the exact moment of a hyper-geometric collapse, shattering into a precision vortex of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards against a clinical #FFFFFF void. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, pixel sorting, and extreme RGB chromatic aberration intersect the sharp planes. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian surfaces. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the mathematical beauty of digital chaos.
